answers: Urban planning is the process of designing and organizing cities — land use, transportation, housing, parks, and infrastructure to create livable, sustainable communities.
Urban planning important karon planned city te traffic manageable hoy, green spaces thake, clean water ar sanitation thake, ar people er quality of life better hoy.
A smart city uses technology and data to improve urban services like traffic management, energy efficiency, waste management, and public safety. Examples include Singapore, Barcelona, and Dubai.

Challenges in urban planning include rapid population growth, housing shortages, traffic congestion, pollution, and balancing development with environmental conservation. Good planning requires long-term vision.
